name: Lemon-Poppy Seed Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant vanilla pudding mix (0.9-oz pkg)
3/4 cup Frozen whipped topping (reduced calorie type), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine milk, pudding mix, poppy seeds and 1 teaspoon lemon peel. Cover and process on high until pudding is mixed.
2. Pour the mixture into crusts and chill.
3. Just before serving, combine whipped topping and remaining lemon peel. Divide over pies and top with additional grated lemon peel if desired.
4. Serve immediately.
